assertions.text: x + t' * a == y - t' * b
t' * a + t' * b == y - x
t * a + t * b == y - x
x + t * a == y - t * b

ensures.text: t >= 1 ==> MeetAt(x, y, a, b, t)
t == -1 ==> forall t': int {:trigger MeetAt(x, y, a, b, t')} :: t' >= 1 ==> !MeetAt(x, y, a, b, t')
